name: Onion Soup with Beer & Cheddar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart heavy pot (preferably cast iron or copper), melt the butter over low heat.
2. Add the onions and cook, covered, for 15 minutes.
3. Uncover and continue cooking until the onions turn a deep golden color, about 30 to 40 minutes, depending on your pot. Stir frequently.
4. Add the broth and nutmeg, cover, and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, in a small pot, bring the beer to a boil over medium heat until it has reduced by half.
7. Remove from the heat and stir in the melted Cheddar cheese.
8. Transfer this mixture to a blender and blend until smooth.
9. Add 1 cup of the onion soup to the blender and blend until smooth.
10. Return the puree to the pot, add the reserved liquid, and stir in the Cheddar cheese mixture.
11. Taste for salt and pepper.
12. Serve piping hot in a tureen.
